commands.review_summary:
This PR changes sandbox env value validation to warn on long structured base64-like values only when the env var name looks credential-related, updates the skill override caller, and adjusts sanitizer tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main has the broad value-only 80-character base64-character regex and the existing test still expects SAFE_TEXT to warn despite the non-sensitive key.
commands.review_followup: This PR needs contributor proof and a maintainer/secops decision or patch for the narrowed credential-name warning policy; it is not a safe automated repair lane while the real behavior proof gate is still unmet.

target.title: fix(sandbox): reduce base64 env warning false positives
target.body:
## Summary

- Tighten sandbox env value warnings so long base64-like values only warn when the env var name also looks credential-related.
- Require a more plausible base64 shape: 128+ chars, length divisible by 4, valid padding only at the end.
- Keep null-byte blocking and max-length warnings unchanged, including for explicitly configured sandbox env and skill env override paths.

Fixes #39680.

## Verification

- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/sandbox/sanitize-env-vars.ts src/agents/sandbox/sanitize-env-vars.test.ts src/agents/skills/env-overrides.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/sandbox/sanitize-env-vars.ts src/agents/sandbox/sanitize-env-vars.test.ts src/agents/skills/env-overrides.ts`
- Direct runtime proof with `node --import tsx --input-type=module` verified:
  - a long base64-like `SAFE_TEXT` value stays allowed with no warning
  - a null-byte value is still blocked
  - a structured base64 `CONFIG_TOKEN` still emits the credential-data warning

Note: I attempted the focused Vitest file through the repo wrapper/direct Vitest, but the wrapper path hung while building and the scoped config invocation did not discover this file in this checkout. The direct runtime proof above exercises the changed exported functions.
target.author: thiagocaltoe
